frontmatter.title: Victory for Democracy in Bolivia
frontmatter.description: Luis Arce of the Movement for Socialism (MAS) party was inaugurated as President of Bolivia on November 8th, 2020 after a landslide victory in the 2020 general election. Following a long year of violent political unrest caused by a U.S-backed coup, not only is this a convincing victory for the MAS, but also for democracy as a whole.
